title: FCALL_RO
complexity: Depends on the function that is executed.

keySpecs.notes: We cannot tell how the keys will be used so we assume the worst, RO and ACCESS

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
This is a read-only variant of the [`FCALL`]() command that cannot execute commands that modify data. For more information about when to use this command vs [`FCALL`](), please refer to [Read-only scripts](). For more information please refer to [Introduction to Redis Functions](). ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** The return value depends on the function that was executed. **RESP3:** The return value depends on the function that was executed.
intro:
This is a read-only variant of the [`FCALL`]() command that cannot execute commands that modify data.

For more information about when to use this command vs [`FCALL`](), please refer to [Read-only scripts]().

For more information please refer to [Introduction to Redis Functions]().
